2026-04-16T06:52:18.7801763Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7802320Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7802778Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7803155Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7803469Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7803704Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7803859Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7804035Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7804203Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7804430Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7804628Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7804909Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-16T06:52:18.7805166Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-16T06:53:47.5113894Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T06:53:29.080008949Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":"58210","method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-16T06:53:47.5124986Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T06:53:29.286101416Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58210,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] Add emitter config to control model renaming; fix conflict with @clientName on resource update/patch models\",\"body\":\"## Problem\\n\\nThe management generator applies model renaming transformations **unconditionally** in `NameVisitor.cs` (e.g. renaming the body model of a PATCH operation to `{ResourceName}Patch`, or `{ResourceName}CreateOrUpdateContent` if also used in PUT). This mandatory rename **silently overrides** any `@@clientName` decorator the user may have applied to that model in TypeSpec.\\n\\n### Example\\n\\nIf a user writes:\\n```typespec\\n@@clientName(MyPatchModel, \\u0026#34;CustomPatchName\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\nthe generator still produces `{ResourceName}Patch` because `NameVisitor.PreVisitModel()` runs unconditionally after TypeSpec name resolution.\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nThe rename logic in `NameVisitor.PreVisitModel()` (`eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Visitors/NameVisitor.cs`) always calls `type.Update(name: ...)` for resource update models without checking whether the user has already supplied a custom name via `@@clientName`.\\n\\n## Proposed Solution\\n\\nAdd an **emitter config option** (e.g. `apply-model-renaming`, default `true`) to control whether the automatic model renaming logic in `NameVisitor` is applied. When the option is `false` (or when a model already has a user-specified client name), the generator should skip the automatic rename.\\n\\nAlternatively (or in addition), `NameVisitor` should check whether the model already has a user-provided `@@clientName` and skip the override in that case.\\n\\n## Affected Files\\n\\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Visitors/NameVisitor.cs`\\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/emitter/src/options.ts` (for the new emitter option)\\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/ManagementInputLibrary.cs`\\n\\n## Acceptance Criteria\\n\\n- [ ] An emitter config option controls whether automatic model renaming is applied\\n- [ ] When a model has a user-provided `@@clientName`, the automatic rename does not override it\\n- [ ] Existing tests continue to pass (default behavior unchanged)\\n- [ ] New test covers the opt-out / `@@clientName` override scenario\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58210\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-16T06:50:46Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-16T06:51:30Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-16T06:53:47.5136378Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T06:53:29.297926807Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":58210,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-16T06:53:47.5147421Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T06:53:29.461404972Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58210,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] Add emitter config to control model renaming; fix conflict with @clientName on resource update/patch models\",\"body\":\"## Problem\\n\\nThe management generator applies model renaming transformations **unconditionally** in `NameVisitor.cs` (e.g. renaming the body model of a PATCH operation to `{ResourceName}Patch`, or `{ResourceName}CreateOrUpdateContent` if also used in PUT). This mandatory rename **silently overrides** any `@@clientName` decorator the user may have applied to that model in TypeSpec.\\n\\n### Example\\n\\nIf a user writes:\\n```typespec\\n@@clientName(MyPatchModel, \\u0026#34;CustomPatchName\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\nthe generator still produces `{ResourceName}Patch` because `NameVisitor.PreVisitModel()` runs unconditionally after TypeSpec name resolution.\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nThe rename logic in `NameVisitor.PreVisitModel()` (`eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Visitors/NameVisitor.cs`) always calls `type.Update(name: ...)` for resource update models without checking whether the user has already supplied a custom name via `@@clientName`.\\n\\n## Proposed Solution\\n\\nAdd an **emitter config option** (e.g. `apply-model-renaming`, default `true`) to control whether the automatic model renaming logic in `NameVisitor` is applied. When the option is `false` (or when a model already has a user-specified client name), the generator should skip the automatic rename.\\n\\nAlternatively (or in addition), `NameVisitor` should check whether the model already has a user-provided `@@clientName` and skip the override in that case.\\n\\n## Affected Files\\n\\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Visitors/NameVisitor.cs`\\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/emitter/src/options.ts` (for the new emitter option)\\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/ManagementInputLibrary.cs`\\n\\n## Acceptance Criteria\\n\\n- [ ] An emitter config option controls whether automatic model renaming is applied\\n- [ ] When a model has a user-provided `@@clientName`, the automatic rename does not override it\\n- [ ] Existing tests continue to pass (default behavior unchanged)\\n- [ ] New test covers the opt-out / `@@clientName` override scenario\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58210\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-16T06:50:46Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-16T06:51:30Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
